title: Gmod Admin Physgun
body:
## Gmod's admin physgun in minecraft.

### Usage:
1) Give you the physicsgun : /physgun
2) Right-click on the player once to pick him up.
3) Hit the player to drop him.

### Permissions:
- physicsgun.give
- physicsgun.use

### More infos:
- The config.yml file allows to add (or not) messages/title to the player when he is taken/released. You can also choose whether the physgun can only be used on players, or any other living entity.
- You can reload with /physgunreload.
- If needed: CustomModelData of the physicsgun is 1412 ([example of usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YTo08UaW/images/d90f25b2e6079f00550830c087075d0935e6d430.png)).

### Demo:
![Demonstration of physgun usage](https://i.imgur.com/511eAJI.gif)
